title: Professionals in IT and engineering: review
body: "This review was commissioned by the Home Secretary in August 2024. It considers:   the types of roles in shortage causes of shortages including training, pay and conditions how the IT, telecommunications and engineering sectors have responded and adapted to these shortages the impact, if any, of being on the immigration salary list policies that could encourage these sectors to recruit from the domestic workforce  "

taxons.title: Entering and staying in the UK
